description: A vertical, portrait-orientation quote/testimonial graphic from U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services. The entire background is a solid medium-blue with a very faint, large pale-blue opening-quotation-mark watermark in the upper left. The main content is a block quote in white sans-serif type, with select phrases bolded for emphasis. It reads: '"For years, states have pleaded for tools to help identify and stop aliens from hijacking our elections," said USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser. "Under the leadership of President Trump and Secretary Noem, USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud. We expect further improvements soon and remain committed to restoring trust in American elections."' The bolded phrases are 'stop aliens,' the speaker attribution 'USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser' (italic bold), and 'restoring trust in American elections.' At the bottom right is the DHS/USCIS circular seal beside white text 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services.' The style is a minimal, text-forward agency quote card with no photograph. The messaging is overtly political propaganda: it advances the claim that non-citizens are committing voter fraud ('hijacking our elections') and credits Trump and DHS Secretary Noem with combating it via the SAVE program. The technique uses an official-spokesman quote to lend authority to the voter-fraud narrative. Target audience is the general public and supporters receptive to election-integrity messaging.
notable_text: "For years, states have pleaded for tools to help identify and stop aliens from hijacking our elections... Under the leadership of President Trump and Secretary Noem, USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud... restoring trust in American elections." - USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser
